info.title: Juniper Threat Intelligence API
info.description: Juniper Threat Intelligence Public API for managing threat feeds including DNS, Command & Control, IP Filter, and Blacklist/Whitelist feeds. Supports file-based and parameter-based operations.

post.summary: Inject domains into a DNS feed via file upload

patch.summary: Update domain threat levels in a DNS feed via file

delete.summary: Remove entries from or delete entire DNS feed via file

post.summary: Inject a domain into a DNS feed via parameters

patch.summary: Update a domain threat level in a DNS feed

delete.summary: Remove a domain from a DNS feed or delete entire feed

post.summary: Inject entries into a C&C feed via file upload

patch.summary: Update threat levels in a C&C feed via file

delete.summary: Remove entries from or delete entire C&C feed via file

post.summary: Inject an entry into a C&C feed via parameters

patch.summary: Update threat level for a C&C feed entry

delete.summary: Remove entry from or delete entire C&C feed

get.summary: Get IP filter file feed status

post.summary: Inject IP entries into an IP filter feed via file

patch.summary: Update IP filter feed entries via file

delete.summary: Remove entries from or delete entire IP filter feed via file

get.summary: Get IP filter param feed status

post.summary: Add an IP entry to an IP filter feed via parameters

delete.summary: Remove an IP entry from an IP filter feed

get.summary: Get blocklist or allowlist file feed status

post.summary: Add entries to a blocklist/allowlist feed via file

patch.summary: Update entries in a blocklist/allowlist feed via file

delete.summary: Remove entries from a blocklist/allowlist feed via file

get.summary: Get blocklist or allowlist param feed status

post.summary: Add an entry to a blocklist/allowlist feed

patch.summary: Update an entry in a blocklist/allowlist feed

delete.summary: Remove an entry from a blocklist/allowlist feed

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token generated from Juniper ATP Cloud Web UI (Administration > Application Tokens)

feedContentType.name: feed_content_type
feedContentType.description: Type of content in the feed (IP, URL, or domain)

request_id.description: ID for tracking the asynchronous request

failOnError.description: Whether to fail the entire operation on any error
Whether to fail the entire operation on any error

server.description: IP, URL, or domain entry. Use '*' to delete the entire feed.

tags.name: DNS File Feeds
tags.description: Manage DNS feeds via file upload

tags.description: Manage Command & Control feeds via file upload

tags.name: CC Param Feeds
tags.description: Manage Command & Control feeds via parameters

tags.name: IP Filter File Feeds
tags.description: Manage IP filter feeds via file upload

tags.name: IP Filter Param Feeds
tags.description: Manage IP filter feeds via parameters

tags.name: Blocklist/Allowlist File Feeds
tags.description: Manage blocklist and allowlist feeds via file upload

tags.name: Blocklist/Allowlist Param Feeds
tags.description: Manage blocklist and allowlist feeds via parameters
